research.status_summary: Actively hiring across engineering, product, sales, and customer success roles as of mid-2026, with no signals of layoffs or acquisition.
research.hiring_policy: Open roles are Israel-HQ-based (Ramat Gan) with some remote positions listed globally; no explicit visa sponsorship or EOR-friendly language found in public job postings — typical for a ~100-person Israeli Series B company.
recent_news: March 31, 2026: Launched 'Agentic Runtime Authority' and 'Agentic Identity Intelligence' — new runtime control capabilities for securing autonomous AI agents across production environments.

RSAC 2026 (April/May 2026): Won multiple industry awards including Global InfoSec 'Market Leader in Identity Management for AI Agents' and Cybersecurity Excellence Awards in AI Agent Identity Security, Machine Identity Security, and Secrets Management.

February 25, 2026: Joined VAST Cosmos as a Technology Partner, delivering validated zero-knowledge encryption and secrets management integration for high-performance AI workloads via VAST Data's AI Operating System.

April 8, 2026: Featured in Gartner 'Innovation Insights: Secrets Management' report, highlighting secretless architectures and workload identity federation as the next phase of the market Akeyless is positioning for.
research.growth_signal: Headcount sits at ~102 employees (March 2026 per LeadIQ), total funding reaching ~$84–95M across rounds including a Series B (Oct 2024), with reported 560% YoY growth and revenue estimates ranging $50–100M.
research.fit_for_lior: Weak direct fit — Akeyless is a deep-infrastructure B2B security play (DevOps/machine identity) with no Creative AI, product analytics, or vibe-coding surface area; role openings are engineering- and sales-heavy with a Technical Product Manager role as the closest adjacent opportunity.
